ham: Hello Ravi, this is HR from TechNova. We would like to schedule your interview for the Software Engineer role. Can you confirm your availability on 3rd May at 10:00 AM? Reply YES to confirm or NO to reschedule. Thank you.
spam: Hey! This is your bank. We’re offering a 30% limit increase on your credit card. Please confirm your account details by clicking <URL> or call 9999999999. Hurry, this offer expires soon!
